I INTRODUCTION 
I.1. Summary 
This document is the user manual for the CMEMS Ocean Monitoring Indicator (OMI) 
BLKSEA_OMI_HEALTH_OXYGEN_TREND, that includes three variables:   
- Oxygen penetration depth , which provides time series describing the evolution of the oxygen 
penetration depth in the Black Sea, derived from ship casts and autonomous Argo profiles. The oxygen 
penetration depth, [m], is the depth at which the dissolved oxygen con centration [O2] < 20µM. 
- Oxygen penetration density , which provides time series describing the evolution of the oxygen 
penetration depth in the Black Sea, on a potential density  anomaly vertical scale.  This diagnostic is 
derived from ship casts and autonomo us Argo profiles. The oxygen penetration density, [kg/m³], is the 
potential density anomaly at the oxygen penetration depth defined above.
